calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-03-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Continued To Dec-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KARAN GARTNER'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED with leave to amend. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend to substitute-in the proper plaintiff. Plaintiff, in her individual capacity, is not the owner of the property. (RJN, Ex. B.) Plaintiff is also granted leave to amend her sole cause of action. In their opposition to the motion, Plaintiff claims she is asserting a cause of action for intentional interference with prospective economic relation. If that is the case, Plaintiff must label their cause of action as such and allege facts supporting each element of the cause of action. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Continued To Aug-29-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KARAN GARTNER's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Continued to August 29, 2025, to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30am. That department handles real property disputes per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Both parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than August 15, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
